mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( sns_id, sns, role, status ) VALUES ( #{snsId}, #{sns}, #{role}, #{status} )

INSERT INTO member ( sns_id, sns, nickname, tos, privacy_policy, agree_at, role, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{snsId}, #{sns}, #{nickname}, #{tos}, #{privacyPolicy}, #{agreeAt}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, sns_id, sns, nickname, tos, privacy_policy, agree_at, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE id = #{memberId}
SELECT id, sns_id, sns, nickname, tos, privacy_policy, agree_at, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE sns_id = #{snsId}
